---
title: "Who are we"
format: html
---

Our team focuses on improving the understanding and engagement with ONS analysis. We offer a range of services in data visualisation, journalism, graphic design, content design and social media.

## Awards

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
<a href="https://analysisfunction.civilservice.gov.uk/news_categories/analysis-in-government-awards/" class="text-decoration-none">
<div class="card h-100">
<img src="images/whoarewe/img_5054.jpg" class="card-img-top">
<div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
<h4 class="card-title">Analysis in Government Award</h4>
<p class="card-subtitle">Census localised content</p>
</div>
</div>
</a>


:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
<a href="https://analysisfunction.civilservice.gov.uk/news_categories/analysis-in-government-awards/" class="text-decoration-none">
<div class="card h-100">
<img src="images/whoarewe/img_5055.jpg" class="card-img-top">
<div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
<h4 class="card-title">Analysis in Government Award</h4>
<p class="card-subtitle">Launching Explore Local Statistics Beta service</p>
</div>
</div>
</a>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
<a href="https://rss.org.uk/training-events/events/excellence-awards/campion-award-for-excellence-in-official-statistic/" class="text-decoration-none">
<div class="card h-100">
<img src="images/whoarewe/img_5056.jpg" class="card-img-top">
<div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
<h4 class="card-title">Campion Award</h4>
<p class="card-subtitle">ONS 2021 Census Outputs & Dissemination and ONS Digital Publishing Team</p>
</div>
</div>
</a>

:::

:::

<div id="footer">
You can contact us at [digitalcontent@ons.gov.uk](mailto:digitalcontent@ons.gov.uk) and we will set up a consultation to see how we can best support you.</div>
